docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,360.00 FILED BY FRANCISCAN HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPARD, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED AUG-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPARD, CHRISTOPHER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCAN HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-01-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SHARON PITMANN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PRESENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCAN HOTEL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANCISCAN HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEPARD, CHRISTOPHER $3,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
